Sandbox_StopZombieSafehouseSpawns_Enable: When ON (default), the natural zombie respawn path will not place real zombies on any tile inside a claimed safehouse. Gates PlayerSpawns.allowZombie so both standing and moving respawn slots are rejected for safehouse squares. Existing zombies inside a safehouse are not removed; admin/scripted horde spawns and network sync are unaffected. OFF restores vanilla behavior.
